summary: A clipped CNBC live segment of Acting Labor Secretary Keith Sonderling speaking about April's jobs report, using the word 'resilient' for Trump's economy and stating the print nearly doubled expectations. Single-shot broadcast talking-head with CNBC bug, 'ACTING LABOR SEC. ON JOBS REPORT' chyron and a running stock ticker. No music track.
notable_text: ACTING LABOR SEC. ON JOBS REPORT; KEITH SONDERLING ACTING LABOR SECRETARY; CNBC; BREAKING NEWS
